title: Ted Talks Padres Baseball: An Evening with Ted Leitner
description: <p>Spend an unforgettable evening with Ted Leitner—the legendary voice of the San Diego Padres—as he shares stories from a lifetime behind the microphone. Hosted by the San Diego History Center, this lively, free-flowing conversation will feature Ted at his very best: candid, witty, and wonderfully unpredictable. Drawing from his memoir Ted Talks, he’ll revisit the personalities, <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/ted-talks-padres-baseball-an-evening-with-ted-leitner/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: San Diego’s Underwater Forests with Oriana Poindexter
description: <p>Discover the fascinating world of seaweed forests on a visual adventure with artist and marine scientist, Oriana Poindexter. Seaweed forests are some of the most incredible habitats on Earth, and yet these powerful sanctuaries are often overlooked and understudied. That’s where Poindexter comes in. Blending experimental photography techniques with her background in marine sciences, Oriana <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/san-diegos-underwater-forests-with-oriana-poindexter/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n
venue: San Diego Natural History Museum (The Nat)

title: 4th Annual Juneteenth Harriet Tubman Bird Walk
description: <p>Join us for a powerful morning of remembrance, nature, and cultural history as WorldBeat Cultural Center hosts the 4th Annual Harriet Tubman Freedom Birdwatch in honor of Juneteenth and the legacy of Black resistance and liberation. This year’s experience will take place in and around WorldBeat Center’s gardens, where participants will engage in guided birdwatching, cultural storytelling, and hands-on learning. In partnership <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/4th-annual-juneteenth-harriet-tubman-bird-walk/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: A Space for All of Us
description: <p>Sensory-Friendly Quiet Mornings at the Museum The Museum\'s sensory-friendly quiet hours are held every Sunday from 10 a.m. to 11 a.m. This time is dedicated to creating a calmer, quieter museum experience. We remain open to the public during this time, and all are welcome to visit the Museum. During this time, specific exhibit features <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/a-space-for-all-of-us-2/2026-06-21/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: Chulita Vinyl Club Dance Party
Chulita Vinyl Club Dance Party
Intricacy San Diego: Gabriel & Dresden Stories We Tell OTC
description: GABRIEL & DRESDEN  STORIES WE TELL25 YEAR ANNIVERSARY TOUR Not just a music project, a shared emotional journey. Gabriel & Dresden want to express our gratitude and thanks, from the bottom of their hearts. Whether you joined them in 2001 or beyond, they would not be here today without you. Through heartbreak anthems, dance-floor catharsis, sunrise sets, road trips, Twitch marathons and personal headphone moments, G&D songs have always been about stories. Stories of love, loss, hope and the connection that makes us all feel like family. The new tour called Stories We Tell, is a celebration of every song, lyric and shared moment that has connected for 25 years. For the first time ever, they are playing full open to close sets of only G&D's own music. Gabriel & Dresden originals and remixes only, from their very first release to music still in progress. No filler. No edits. No one else’s remixes. Just the pure thread of what they have made over the past 25 years.  Friday June 26th9pm  21+Spin Night Club2028 Hancock St, San Diego, CA 92110 BOTTLE SERVICE619-798-4696SPINVIPHOST@GMAIL.COM

Moving beyond familiar green teas, guests will discover a deeply roasted hojicha.
